rules.title: Active sprint tickets must have an assignee
rules.fix_description: Set assignee on the ticket

rules.title: Every ticket must have a clear summary and description with context/acceptance criteria/repro steps
rules.fix_description: Add a meaningful description with context and acceptance criteria (stories) or reproduction steps (bugs)

rules.title: Every ticket must have correct issue type and component
rules.fix_description: Add the team component to the ticket

rules.title: Every ticket must have a priority set — no ticket rides the default
rules.fix_description: Set an explicit priority

rules.title: Bugs must have Affects Version and severity set at triage
rules.fix_description: Set Affects Version and severity on this bug

rules.title: Tickets inactive for more than 14 days while In Progress will be flagged
rules.fix_description: Update the ticket or move it to the correct status

rules.title: hygiene-bot-ignore label exempts a ticket from enforcement
rules.label: hygiene-bot-ignore
rules.fix_description: Exempted tickets appear in the weekly digest

rules.title: Work must not begin until ticket is In Progress — opening a PR requires at least In Progress
rules.fix_description: Transition ticket to In Progress

rules.title: When a PR is marked ready for review, ticket moves to Review
rules.fix_description: Transition ticket to Review

rules.title: If changes are requested on any PR, ticket returns to In Progress
rules.fix_description: Transition ticket back to In Progress

rules.title: When all PRs are merged, ticket moves to Closed (if closure criteria met)
rules.fix_description: Verify closure criteria (RES-1) then transition to Closed

rules.title: PR closed without merging — assignee notified to resolve state manually
rules.fix_description: A PR was closed without merging — review the ticket status manually

rules.title: No ticket may be moved to Closed while required backports are missing
rules.fix_description: Complete all required backports before closing

rules.title: Workflow transitions must never be skipped manually
rules.fix_description: Ticket was transitioned out of order — review the changelog

rules.title: Branch names and PR titles must include the ticket key
rules.fix_description: Rename the branch or update the PR title to include the ticket key

rules.title: All PRs must appear on the ticket via development panel, remote link, or PR URL field
rules.fix_description: Link all PRs to the Jira ticket

rules.title: One ticket per logical change — avoid umbrella tickets with many unrelated PRs
rules.fix_description: Consider splitting into separate tickets if PRs cover unrelated changes

rules.title: Backport PRs must reference the original commit or link the original PR
rules.fix_description: Add 'cherry picked from commit <sha>' to the backport PR body

rules.title: Every ticket with a merged PR must have at least one fixVersion
rules.fix_description: Add the appropriate fixVersion

rules.title: fixVersion set must match the release branches that actually contain the fix
rules.fix_description: Update fixVersions to match the branches containing the fix

rules.title: Oldest release line containing the fix must appear in fixVersions
rules.fix_description: Add the earliest release version containing the fix

rules.title: A fixVersion must not be claimed unless the corresponding branch contains the fix
rules.fix_description: Remove unverified fixVersions or confirm the fix is on those branches

rules.title: Backports must land within 2 business days of the main merge
rules.fix_description: Complete pending backports — deadline exceeded

rules.title: Released (archived) versions are immutable — changes require release-manager approval
rules.fix_description: Do not modify fixVersions for released versions without release-manager approval

rules.title: Version naming must follow RHOAI conventions
rules.fix_description: Use exact version names from the Jira version picker per Appendix B

rules.title: Each release version has a code freeze date
rules.fix_description: Configure freeze dates in config.env or hygiene-rules.json

rules.title: After freeze, every ticket targeting the frozen version must be Closed and downstream-complete
rules.fix_description: Close this ticket or remove the frozen version from fixVersions

rules.title: Unresolved tickets past freeze appear in daily digest
rules.fix_description: Resolve this ticket — it is past its version's code freeze date

rules.title: Pre-freeze warning posted 3 days before each freeze
rules.fix_description: Code freeze in 3 days — ensure this ticket will be complete

rules.title: Post-freeze merges require freeze-exception label and release-manager sign-off
rules.fix_description: Add freeze-exception label and get release-manager approval

rules.title: Ticket may only be Closed when all PRs merged, backports landed, fixVersions validated, required fields complete
rules.fix_description: Complete all closure criteria before closing

rules.title: Every closed ticket must carry a resolution value
rules.fix_description: Set the resolution (Fixed, Won't Fix, Duplicate, Cannot Reproduce)

rules.title: Won't Fix or Duplicate tickets must have a comment explaining why
rules.fix_description: Add a comment explaining why this was resolved as Won't Fix or Duplicate (include duplicate key if applicable)

rules.title: Stories require QA sign-off field set before Closed
rules.fix_description: Set the QA sign-off field before closing
